title: triticum sativum var. turgidum
intro: Triticum sativum var. turgidum, commonly known as durum wheat, is a type of wheat plant that belongs to the grass family. The medicinal properties of durum wheat include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Durum wheat is also rich in fiber, which can help to lower cholesterol levels, promote regular bowel movements, and support healthy blood sugar levels, offering numerous health benefits. The herbal preparations of durum wheat include flour, semolina, and bread, which can be consumed in moderation as part of a balanced diet to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
